data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Transfer/revoke controls', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence of this functionality being tested or implemented. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of transfer/revoke controls being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
